name: Yole App Navigation Test Bank
description: Navigation flow tests for all screens, tabs, drawer, deep links, rotation, and theme switching

test_cases.name: Navigate to Files screen

steps.name: Tap Files tab
steps.action: Tap/click 'Files' in bottom navigation bar or sidebar
steps.expected: Files screen displayed with file browser or recent files

test_cases.expected_result: Files screen accessible from main navigation

test_cases.name: Navigate to Todo screen

steps.name: Tap Todo tab
steps.expected: Todo screen shown with todo.txt task list or empty state

test_cases.expected_result: Todo screen accessible from main navigation

test_cases.name: Navigate to QuickNote screen

steps.name: Verify quick note editor
steps.action: Check that text input is immediately available
steps.expected: Editor ready for input without extra taps

test_cases.expected_result: QuickNote screen accessible and editor ready

test_cases.name: Navigate to More/Settings screen

steps.name: Tap More tab
steps.action: Tap/click 'More' or overflow menu in navigation bar
steps.expected: More screen or settings menu opens

steps.name: Verify menu items
steps.expected: Settings, About, Storage, Theme options visible

test_cases.expected_result: More screen shows all top-level settings options

test_cases.name: Open Editor from file browser

steps.name: Browse to a text file
steps.action: Navigate file browser to a .md file

steps.name: Open file
steps.expected: Editor screen opens with file content

steps.name: Verify back navigation
steps.expected: Returns to file browser at same location

test_cases.expected_result: Editor opens from browser and back navigation works

test_cases.name: Switch between Editor and Preview

steps.name: Open a markdown file in editor
Switch back to Edit tab
steps.expected: Source editor restored, cursor position preserved

test_cases.expected_result: Edit/Preview tab switching works without losing cursor position

test_cases.name: Open Settings screen

steps.name: Check settings categories
steps.expected: Categories: Editor, Appearance, Storage, About visible

test_cases.expected_result: Settings screen navigable with back return

test_cases.name: Bottom navigation bar switches screens

steps.name: Tap each tab in order
steps.action: Tap Files, Todo, QuickNote, More in sequence
steps.expected: Each screen displays correctly on each tap

steps.name: Re-tap current tab
steps.action: While on Files screen, tap Files again
steps.expected: Scrolls to top or refreshes list (no double-navigation)

test_cases.expected_result: Bottom navigation bar works correctly for all tabs

test_cases.name: Drawer menu navigation (Android)

steps.name: Open drawer
steps.action: Swipe right from left edge or tap hamburger menu

steps.name: Select item from drawer
steps.action: Tap a navigation destination in the drawer

steps.name: Close drawer without navigating
steps.action: Tap outside drawer or swipe left

test_cases.expected_result: Navigation drawer opens, navigates, and closes correctly

test_cases.name: System back button navigation (Android)

steps.name: Navigate into sub-screen
steps.action: Open a file in the editor

steps.name: Press system back again
steps.expected: Returns to main Files tab or minimizes app

test_cases.expected_result: System back navigates the back stack correctly

test_cases.name: Sidebar navigation (Desktop)

steps.name: Verify sidebar visible
steps.expected: Left sidebar with navigation items visible

steps.name: Click sidebar items
steps.action: Click Files, Todo, QuickNote in sidebar
steps.expected: Each screen loads in main content area

test_cases.expected_result: Desktop sidebar navigation works and collapses

test_cases.name: Open multiple files in tabs
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple files open in separate tabs

test_cases.name: Switch between open tabs
test_cases.expected_result: Tab switching preserves content of each open file

test_cases.name: Close a tab

steps.name: Close tab 1
steps.action: Tap 'X' on tab 1 or swipe tab away

test_cases.expected_result: Tab close works, remaining tabs unaffected

test_cases.name: Close unsaved tab prompts confirmation

steps.name: Open file and make unsaved changes
steps.action: Open file.md and type new content without saving
steps.expected: Unsaved indicator visible (dot or asterisk on tab)

test_cases.expected_result: Unsaved changes prompt shown before closing tab

test_cases.name: Screen rotation preserves editor state (Android)

steps.name: Open file in editor
steps.action: Open a markdown file, type some text
steps.expected: Editor in portrait mode with content

steps.name: Rotate to landscape
steps.expected: Editor redraws in landscape, content and cursor preserved

steps.name: Rotate back to portrait
steps.expected: Editor in portrait, scroll position preserved

test_cases.expected_result: Rotation preserves editor content and cursor position

test_cases.name: Screen rotation preserves file browser position (Android)

steps.name: Browse to nested directory
steps.action: Navigate 3 levels deep in file browser

steps.name: Rotate device
steps.expected: Same directory shown in landscape layout

steps.name: Verify path preserved
steps.expected: Breadcrumb shows same path as before rotation

test_cases.expected_result: File browser path preserved across rotation

test_cases.name: Open text file via system file manager (Android)

steps.name: Open a .md file from Files app
steps.action: In Android Files app, tap a .md file and choose Yole
steps.expected: Yole opens with the selected file in editor

test_cases.expected_result: Yole handles file open intents from other apps

test_cases.name: Share text to Yole creates new note (Android)

steps.name: Share text from another app
steps.action: In browser, select text and share to Yole
steps.expected: Yole opens with shared text pre-filled in QuickNote or new file

test_cases.expected_result: Share intent populates new note with shared text

test_cases.name: Settings persist across app restart

steps.name: Change a setting
steps.action: Enable line numbers in Settings > Editor

test_cases.expected_result: Settings changes survive app restart

test_cases.name: Switch to dark theme

steps.name: Open theme settings
steps.expected: Theme picker visible: Light, Dark, System

steps.name: Select Dark
steps.expected: App switches to dark theme immediately

steps.name: Verify dark theme
steps.expected: Dark backgrounds, light text throughout the app

test_cases.expected_result: Dark theme applied immediately to all screens

test_cases.name: System theme follows OS setting

steps.name: Set theme to System
steps.expected: Theme matches current OS dark/light mode

steps.name: Toggle OS dark mode
steps.action: Switch OS to dark mode (or back to light)
steps.expected: Yole switches theme to match OS setting

test_cases.expected_result: System theme follows OS dark/light mode changes
